item.title: Ford Motor Company: SUSPENSION:REAR Recall (2024 ford mustang)
item.summary: Ford Motor Company (Ford) is recalling certain 2024 Mustang vehicles. The rear suspension knuckles may have a casting defect that causes them to fail, which can result in a loss of vehicle handling and steering control.
item.affectedPeople: A loss of vehicle handling and steering control increases the risk of a crash.
item.remedy: Dealers will inspect and replace the rear suspension knuckle as necessary, free of charge. Owner notification letters were mailed August 26, 2024. Owners may contact Ford customer service at 1-866-436-7332. Ford's number for this recall is 24S49.
item.payoutAmount: Free repair, remedy, software update, or dealer service if stated by the NHTSA recall
